collections.name: Inequality of Opportunity
collections.description: Theoretical frameworks, measurement approaches, and empirical applications of equality of opportunity and inequality of opportunity in income, wealth, and other outcomes.
representative_titles: Measuring long-term inequality of opportunity
The Measurement of Inequality of Opportunity Theory and an Application to Latin America
Equality of Opportunity Theory and Evidence

Inequality of opportunity in Italy
Upward and Downward Bias When Measuring Inequality of Opportunity
Ex Ante Versus Ex Post Equality of Opportunity
Ramos, Van de gaer — Is Inequality of Opportunity Robust to the Measurement Approach

collections.name: Intergenerational Mobility
collections.description: Studies on the transmission of income, wealth, education, and social status across generations, including mobility measurement and determinants.
representative_titles: Income Inequality, Equality of Opportunity, and Intergenerational Mobility
Where is the Land of Opportunity The Geography of Intergenerational Mobility in the United States
The fading American dream Trends in absolute income mobility since 1940
Intergenerational Wealth Mobility and the Role of Inheritance Evidence from Multiple Generations
The Opportunity Atlas Mapping the Childhood Roots of Social Mobility
Intergenerational Wealth Formation over the Life Cycle Evidence from Danish Wealth Records 1984-2013
Three Meanings of Intergenerational Mobility
Lee, Seshadri — On the intergenerational transmission of economic status

collections.name: Wealth Inequality & Inheritance
collections.description: Research on the distribution of wealth, its concentration, intergenerational transfers, bequests, and estate taxation.

Top wealth shares in the UK over more than a century
Inheritance and wealth inequality Evidence from population registers

Born with a Silver Spoon Danish Evidence on Wealth Inequality in Childhood
Wealth inequality and intergenerational links

collections.name: Income Inequality & Redistribution
collections.description: Papers on income distribution, inequality measurement, redistributive policies, and the relationship between inequality and economic growth.

collections.name: Gender Inequality & Labour
collections.description: Studies on gender wage gaps, gender roles, female labour market participation, child penalties, and policy implications for gender equality.

collections.description: Papers on taxation, tax evasion, optimal tax design, tax policy, and redistribution mechanisms including inheritance and wealth taxes.
